notes: Approximate trajectory using simplified patched-conic model. Not JPL-precision.

phases.name: Launch & Ascent
phases.description: SLS Block 1 launch from KSC LC-39B, ascent to LEO

phases.name: Parking Orbit
phases.description: Circular LEO at 185 km altitude for systems checkout

phases.name: Trans-Lunar Injection
phases.description: ICPS upper stage burn to escape Earth orbit

phases.name: Outbound Coast
phases.description: Free-return trajectory coasting toward the Moon

phases.name: Lunar Flyby
phases.description: Close approach ~100 km above lunar far side

phases.name: Reentry & Splashdown
phases.description: Skip reentry and splashdown in the Pacific Ocean
